School Calendar

2026 Academic Year

Term Dates

Term 1

Start: January 7, 2026 (Boarders) / January 8, 2026 (Day Scholars) | End: March 31, 2026

Duration: 13 weeks

Term 2

Start: May 6, 2026 | End: August 2, 2026

Duration: 13 weeks

Term 3

Start: September 2, 2026 | End: November 29, 2026

Duration: 13 weeks

Note: Dates are subject to change. Please confirm with the school office for the most current information.

Important School Events

7th January 2026
academic Opening Date (Boarders)
8th January 2026
academic Opening Date (Day Scholars)
14th January 2026
exam Opening Assessment
7th – 17th January 2026
service Ten days of Prayer
16th January 2026
academic Orientation /Annual General Meeting (AGM)
1st February 2026
academic Visiting Day
10th February 2026
academic Games and Sports Day
February 11, 2026
academic ECD & Lower Primary Academic Trip
February 12, 2026
academic Primary & Junior School Academic Trip
February 16-20, 2026
exam Mid-Term Assessments
February 25 - March 3, 2026
academic Half-Term (Boarders / Day Scholars)
February 27, 2026
academic Class Representatives Meeting
March 12, 2026
service Scouts Day / Playgroup Second Clinic
March 20, 2026
service Environmental Day
March 23-27, 2026
exam End Term Examinations
March 25-28, 2026
service Vacation Bible School (VBS)
March 26, 2026
academic Global Children's Day
March 31, 2026
academic Closing Day
May 6, 2026
academic Term 2 Opening
June 1, 2026
holiday Madaraka Day - No School
September 2, 2026
academic Term 3 Opening
October 10, 2026
holiday Mashujaa Day - No School
October 20, 2026
exam KPSEA Examinations Begin
November 29, 2026
academic End of Term 3 / Closing Day

Examination Periods

Term 1 Opening Assessment

Dates: January 14, 2026

Term 1 Mid-Term Assessments

Dates: February 16-20, 2026

Term 1 End Term Examinations

Dates: March 23-27, 2026

Term 2 Examinations

Dates: July 22-26, 2026

Term 3 Examinations

Dates: November 18-22, 2026

KPSEA Examinations

Dates: October 20-24, 2026

Students should prepare well in advance for examinations. Study schedules and revision materials are provided by teachers.

Visiting Days (Boarding Students)

Parents and guardians of boarding students are welcome to visit on designated visiting days. We encourage families to spend quality time together during these special days.

February 2, 2026

Term 1 Visiting Day

10:00 AM - 5:00 PM

May 25, 2026

Term 2 Visiting Day

10:00 AM - 5:00 PM

October 5, 2026

Term 3 Visiting Day

10:00 AM - 5:00 PM

Note: For security and to maintain school routines, visits outside of designated visiting days require prior arrangement with the school administration.
